assignments.twist: the Lighthill-Whitham-Richards traffic conservation law, shown to be the dense-traffic limit of the discrete Follow-the-Leader particle model viewed as a numerical (Lagrangian) scheme, with weak entropy solutions

core_model_summary: A first-order scalar hyperbolic conservation law for traffic density (LWR) whose weak entropy solutions arise as the limit of a Follow-the-Leader discretization in Lagrangian coordinates.
